package.name: mserve_sensehat
package.description:
Pi Sense HAT (2): 8x8 LED matrix, 5-way joystick, and LSM9DS1 IMU. Plain rclcpp::Node, not lifecycle-managed — same reasoning as mserve_display (no hardware "connect" step of its own; the kernel already owns the framebuffer/joystick/I2C devices, this node just reads/writes them).
LED matrix shows drivechain connection status (X = disconnected, O = connected); the joystick's center click calls mserve_drivechain's connect service, same action as mserve_display's/mserve_joystick's Connect button. IMU publishes sensor_msgs/Imu standalone — not yet fused into mserve_base's odometry.
IMU access is via RTIMULib (vendored source, see ws/src/third_party/README.md) — no apt package exists for this distro (it's Raspberry Pi OS/Debian-only upstream).
